steps.title: Translate the phrase
steps.content:
The phrase "at least" means greater than or equal to. The phrase "twice the value of $y$" means $2y$. So the possible values of $x$ satisfy
$$x\ge 2y$$

steps.title: Match the inequality
steps.content: The inequality that represents the possible values of $x$ is $x\ge94$. The answer is C.
